markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Chicago WS wins the Boston vs Chicago WS professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026 at 2:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Boston vs Chicago WS professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026 at 2:10 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: Boston vs Chicago WS Winner?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Tyler Tolbert records 2+ RBIs in Philadelphia vs Kansas City professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 6, 2026 at 2:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Tyler Tolbert is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tyler Tolbert starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tyler Tolbert is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Tyler Tolbert is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on RBIs recorded.
markets.title: Tyler Tolbert: 2+ RBIs?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Renato Veiga records at least 1 assist during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Portugal vs Spain professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 6, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Portugal vs Spain professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 6, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Renato Veiga: 1+ assists?
